query:
SELECT roi.id, roi.productId, roi.expectedQuantity, roi.receivedQuantity, roi.status, p.sku, p.unitsPerBox
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN products p ON p.id = roi.productId
WHERE roi.tenantId = 30001
ORDER BY roi.id;
